title: m2c decompilation scaffold
description: Run the harness-vendored m2c fork to generate a C-like scaffold for a function or translation unit.
status_message: Harness bridge v1: APIs delegate to reference/melee-harness-master/tools/decomp.py and the harness-vendored m2c fork.
limitations: The harness-vendored m2c fork is GPL-3.0 licensed; this suite bridges to it rather than copying implementation code into the orchestrator.
m2c output is a scaffold for understanding control/data flow, not reviewable source and not a substitute for natural decompilation.
Requires pyelftools, pcpp, generated object/asm artifacts, and the melee m2ctx.py helper.

usage.agent_guidance: Use for understanding control/data flow only; never paste scaffold output as final source without naturalizing and validating it.
